basic_details.job_title: SRHC Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Satyawadi Raja Harish Chandra Hospital (SRHC Hospital)
basic_details.short_information: Satyawadi Raja Harish Chandra Hospital (SRHC Hospital) Junior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 4 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the SRHC Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: 35 years for SC/ST, 33 years for OBC. OBC/EWS certificate must be from the Govt. of NCT of Delhi, and for OBC, it must be Non-creamy layer.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Compulsory Rotating Internship, Medical Council Registration
qualification.details: MBBS degree from a recognized University/Institute. Valid registration with a medical council. FMGE cleared for foreign graduates. Completed compulsory rotating internship after 11.05.2024. Not completed one year of Junior Residency in any Government Hospital.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Merit Basis

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SRHC Hospital Junior Resident (MBBS) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts at SRHC Hospital is scheduled for 11th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Junior Resident (MBBS) at SRHC Hospital?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position at Satyawadi Raja Harish Chandra Hospital.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized University/Institute, have completed a compulsory rotating internship, and hold valid registration with a medical council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident (MBBS) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 56100 to Rs. 177500 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the SRHC Hospital Junior Resident (MBBS) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position at SRHC Hospital?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Interested and eligible candidates need to report at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, ID proof, educational certificates, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview, followed by Document Verification, and selection will be based on Merit.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Satyawadi Raja Harish Chandra Hospital located?
faq.answer: Satyawadi Raja Harish Chandra Hospital is located in Delhi, with the pincode 110040.
